zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Lauton於1183年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾洛福頓時，他的父親Adam de Lauton25歲，母親Alice de Winwick22歲。他和Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lauton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Leighton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Leighton or Layton. Most, as for example those in Bedfordshire, Cambridgeshire, Cheshire, Lancashire, and Shropshire, are named with Old English lēac ‘leek’ + tūn ‘settlement’, but Layton in Durham derives from Old English ge-lād ‘road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English pronunciation of Leighton is usually /lɛ:tən/ or /leitən/ (also spelled Layton and Leaton ), but it can also be heard as /laitən/ or as /li:tən/ (also spelled Leaton ), and occasionally as /lɛtən/ (spelled Letton ).

variants.name: Leyton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Juan Carlos, Alonso, Amalia, Ana, Carlos, Erasmo, Fernando, Jorge, Jose Carlos, Mauricio.
Spanish: altered form of Galician Leitón, a nickname meaning ‘suckling pig’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Lauton was born in 1183, in Lowton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam de Lauton, was 25 and his mother, Alice de Winwick, was 22. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Lauton est né en 1183, à Lowton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam de Lauton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice de Winwick, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Lauton 1183 in Lowton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Lauton 25 und seine Mutter Alice de Winwick 22. Er hatte mit Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Lauton è nato il nel 1183 nel Lowton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Adam de Lauton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Winwick, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Lautonが1183年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアロウトンで生まれた時，父Adam de Lautonは25歳，母Alice de Winwickは22歳であった。彼はAlice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowtonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Lauton(이)가 1183년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 로턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Lauton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Winwick(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Lauton родился в 1183 г. в местности лоутон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam de Lauton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Winwick, 22. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Lauton nació en 1183, en Lowton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Adam de Lauton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alice de Winwick, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Alice de Winwick Lady of Kenyon & Lowton.
